ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Remaining Issues With Respect To The Bank Accounts
Off Calendar Apr-08-2013 Continued To Jun-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Chase for Executor.

Mr. Chase stated that there are multiple Party accounts where the records did not match, that one statement indicates a joint account but that the bank record indicates Tenants in Common (TIC), that the other bank statement reflects a Pay On Death (POD) account but that the bank redord indicates that there is no POD Beneficiary, and that said issues have not been resolved. The remaining issues with respect to the bank accounts was continued to June 10, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Remaining Issues With Respect To The Bank Accounts

Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Continued To Mar-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Chase for Lavoisier Stallworth. Harriett Stallworth Stevens (Beneficiary) also present.

Mr. Chase stated that he does not beleive there are any objections, that everyone is in agreement that the partial distributions and the Creditor's Claims be paid, and that he has not spoken to Isaac Stallworth. The Court granted the preliminary distributions (subject to review of the order). The remaining issues with respect to the bank accounts were continued to February 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Saxena.
